hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */kubernetes/apps/*/ks.yaml|*/kubernetes/apps/*/kustomization.yaml) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Context reminder: if an app was added or removed, update .agents/context/02_apps_inventory.md"}}';;  */kubernetes/components/*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Context reminder: if a component changed, update .agents/context/06_components.md"}}';;  */docker/*/docker-compose.yaml) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Context reminder: if a docker service was added or removed, update .agents/context/08_docker_hosts.md"}}';;  */helmrelease.yaml) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Context reminder: if chart, version, or image changed, update .agents/context/02_apps_inventory.md"}}';;  */externalsecret*.yaml) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Context reminder: if secret keys or aKeyless path changed, update .agents/context/05_secrets.md"}}';;  *httproute*.yaml|*/ingress*.yaml) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Context reminder: if hostname or route changed, update .agents/context/03_networking.md"}}';;  *pvc*.yaml|*claim*.yaml) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Context reminder: if storage class or capacity changed, update .agents/context/04_storage.md"}}';;  */kubernetes/talos/nodes/*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Context reminder: if node hardware or config changed, update .agents/context/01_nodes.md"}}';; esac

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"KARPATHY CHECK (before every edit):
1. Think Before Coding: state assumptions; if unclear stop and ask
2. Simplicity First: minimum code to solve the problem; nothing speculative
3. Surgical Changes: touch only what you must; no adjacent cleanup
4. Goal-Driven: every changed line traces directly to the user request"}}'; f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */kubernetes/apps/*/ks.yaml|*/kubernetes/apps/*/kustomization.yaml|*/kubernetes/apps/*/helmrelease.yaml) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"CONTEXT GATE: Before this edit READ .agents/context/07_flux_conventions.md — especially the Gotchas section at the top."}}';;  */kubernetes/apps/*/externalsecret*.yaml) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"CONTEXT GATE: Before this edit READ .agents/context/05_secrets.md — especially the Gotchas section at the top."}}';;  *httproute*.yaml|*/ingress*.yaml) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"CONTEXT GATE: Before this edit READ .agents/context/03_networking.md — especially the Gotchas section at the top."}}';;  *pvc*.yaml|*claim*.yaml) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"CONTEXT GATE: Before this edit READ .agents/context/04_storage.md — especially the Gotchas section at the top."}}';;  */kubernetes/components/*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"CONTEXT GATE: Before this edit READ .agents/context/06_components.md — especially the Gotchas section at the top."}}';;  */docker/*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"CONTEXT GATE: Before this edit READ .agents/context/08_docker_hosts.md — especially the Gotchas section at the top."}}';;  */kubernetes/talos/nodes/*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"CONTEXT GATE: Before this edit READ .agents/context/01_nodes.md — especially the Gotchas section at the top."}}';; esac

msg=$(jq -r '.prompt // empty' 2>/dev/null); files=""; echo "$msg" | grep -qiE 'ingress|httproute|dns|sso|authentik|gatus|gateway|envoy' && files="$files 03_networking.md"; echo "$msg" | grep -qiE 'pvc|volsync|kopiur|cnpg|postgres|backup|storageclass|claim|nfs' && files="$files 04_storage.md"; echo "$msg" | grep -qiE 'secret|externalsecret|akeyless|credential' && files="$files 05_secrets.md"; echo "$msg" | grep -qiE 'helmrelease|kustomization|flux|dependson|reconcil' && files="$files 07_flux_conventions.md"; echo "$msg" | grep -qiE 'component|zeroscaler|hpa' && files="$files 06_components.md"; echo "$msg" | grep -qiE 'docker|truenas|unraid|compose|doco' && files="$files 08_docker_hosts.md"; echo "$msg" | grep -qiE 'talos|ai3090|tolerat|nodeSelector|gpu' && files="$files 01_nodes.md"; echo "$msg" | grep -qiE '\bapp\b|new app|add app|namespace' && files="$files 02_apps_inventory.md"; echo "$msg" | grep -qiE 'migrat|apiservice|crd|conflict' && files="$files 09_interactions.md"; [ -n "$files" ] && list=$(echo $files | xargs) && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"BEFORE PLANNING: Read these context files first — '"$list"'"}}'; true
